name: Sirloin Steak with Sauces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a sizzling skillet in the microwave oven at high for about 6 1/2 minutes.
2. Place butter on the preheated skillet to melt. Spread evenly across the surface.
3. Place steak on the skillet.
4. Microwave at high for 4 minutes, turning the steak over.
5. Microwave until medium-rare doneness, 3 to 4 minutes longer.
6. Serve with one of the sauces.
7. Serves 4 to 5.
